reference_captions.caption: A photograph of a presentation slide titled "Conclusion" displayed on a screen, featuring technical text about transformer circuit parameters, a data table, and two frequency-response graphs, with the backs of audience members' heads visible in the foreground.
reference_captions.OCR:
Conclusion
• This paper presents a thorough analysis and comparison of the equivalent circuit parameters of the popular N:N foil-wound transformer and a newly proposed N+1:N foil-wound transformer
• Equations for both transformers are presented for each of the equivalent circuit parameters, and parameter ratios are provided between the two transformers
• Two transformers are constructed with turns-ratios of 16:16 and 17:16, and impedance measurements are performed. The measurements demonstrate a superior performance when using the 17:16 transformer in almost every scenario
